,NGRM.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG

,NGRM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,NGRM.BUNDLE_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,NGRM.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,NGRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,NGRM.DV_BNI_FHI_TYPE_CODE
,NGRM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE  NGRM
 
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_EXEC_CTRL_YE  WIRC
	ON  JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE_YE_ACTUALS'
		
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_REF_MONTHS  WIRRM ON  NGRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WIRRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AND
									WIRRM.MONTH_SEQ_ID BETWEEN WIRC.START_MONTH_SEQ_ID AND WIRC.END_MONTH_SEQ_ID 	AND WIRRM.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'   
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE_HIST WI ON ( NGRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NGRM.GL_DT = WI.GL_DT 
 AND NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD AND  WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      = 'Y')
 
 WHERE  NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ( 'AR','AR-OOD','AR-1C','RCE_ADJ')
 AND NGRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT <0

SELECT DISTINCT 
NGRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NGRM.GL_DT,
NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NGRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGRM
WHERE NGRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR'
AND NGRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT < 0
AND NGRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD NOT IN ('CM', 'DM')
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE NRBSCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NGRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','XAAS')
)

UNION

SELECT DISTINCT 
NGRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NGRM.GL_DT,
NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NGRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGRM
WHERE NGRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR-OOD', 'DRCT_AS_T')
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE NRBSCA.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NGRM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','XASS')
)


UNION 

/*      THIS UNION  COVERS AR         */


SELECT DISTINCT 
NGRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NGRM.GL_DT,

$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGRM
WHERE NGRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  = 'AR' 
AND NGRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('CM', 'DM')
AND NGRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT < 0
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE NRBSCA.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = NGRM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE = NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
)


UNION

/*      THIS UNION  COVERS POS        */


SELECT DISTINCT 
NGRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NGRM.GL_DT,
NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NGRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
,NGRM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGRM
WHERE NGRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('POS','AR')
AND NGRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT > 0
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE  NRBSCA.RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT = NGRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE =  NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
)

UNION

/*      THIS UNION  COVERS POS_ADJ, SLS_ADJ         */


SELECT DISTINCT 
NGRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
NGRM.GL_DT,
NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
NGRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG

$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGRM
WHERE NGRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN 200901 AND 201312
AND NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'SLS_ADJ'
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT NRBSCA 
WHERE NRBSCA.RU_BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUM_INT = NGRM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT 
AND NRBSCA.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('SLS_ADJ', 'POS_ADJ')

 INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_EXEC_CTRL_YE  WIRC
	ON  JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE_YE_ACTUALS'
		
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_REF_MONTHS  WIRRM ON  NGRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WIRRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AND
									WIRRM.MONTH_SEQ_ID BETWEEN WIRC.START_MONTH_SEQ_ID AND WIRC.END_MONTH_SEQ_ID 	AND WIRRM.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'   
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE_HIST WI ON ( NGRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = WI.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NGRM.GL_DT = WI.GL_DT 
 AND NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD =WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD AND  WI.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      = 'N')
 
 WHERE  NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ( 'AR','AR-OOD','AR-1C','RCE_ADJ')
 AND NGRM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT <0
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_RSTD_GL_REV_MEASURE  MT  
WHERE NGRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = MT.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND NGRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=MT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND NGRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=MT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)
